name: Lido ETH → stETH Liquid Staking
description: Stake ETH via Lido and receive stETH 1:1. stETH rebases daily with staking rewards (~3.5% APR base) and is the most liquid LST on Ethereum — usable as collateral everywhere.
use_case: Agent has 5 ETH idle. Stakes via Lido → receives 5 stETH that automatically grows ~3.5%/yr. Can be used as collateral in Aave to borrow more without un-staking.

verification.criteria: Tx target is Lido contract, function submit, value > 0, and post-tx the agent stETH balance increased by approximately msg.value (rounding for share/stake ratio).
